description: CompositionLight weight, synthetic upper with EVA mid soleWash CareClean with a soft, damp cloth. Brush surface to remove dust. No machine washFittingComfort FitThese adidas sports shoes equip your feet with a unique weapon called comfort. These sports shoes have an adaptive fit to allow your feet's natural motion patterns. These Sports shoes offer rugged heel cushioning to support intermediate level sportsmen and women who practice, play any sports, fitness activities except football.
